index.description: Comma-separated list of data streams, indices, and aliases used to limit the request. It’s recommended to execute this API with a single index (or the latest backing index of a data stream) as the API consumes resources significantly.

run_expensive_tasks.description: Must be set to [true] in order for the task to be performed. Defaults to false.

flush.description: Whether flush or not before analyzing the index disk usage. Defaults to true

ignore_unavailable.description: Whether specified concrete indices should be ignored when unavailable (missing or closed)

allow_no_indices.description: Whether to allow (1) wildcard index expressions that match no indices and (2) requests where the final resolved set is empty.

expand_wildcards.description: Whether to expand wildcard expression to concrete indices that are open, closed or both.
